name: Raisin Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Butter or margarine; not die
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add sugar, evaporated milk, molasses, and baking chocolate to the melted butter. Heat gently and stir until the chocolate is fully melted.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil and continue boiling until it reaches the soft ball stage (234-238°F).
4. Remove from heat and allow it to cool to room temperature.
5. Beat until creamy.
6. Add raisins, chopped nuts, and vanilla extract. Continue beating until the mixture holds its shape.
7. Pour into a well-buttered pan.
8. Cut into squares.
